# jellyfin_sso_plugin_configuration (Resource)

Manages the SSO-Auth plugin configuration with typed attributes.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "jellyfin_sso_plugin_configuration" "example" {
  plugin_id = jellyfin_plugin.sso_auth.id

  oid_configs = {
    authentik = {
      oid_endpoint                 = "https://auth.example.com/application/o/jellyfin"
      oid_client_id                = "client-id"
      oid_secret                   = "client-secret"
      enabled                      = true
      enable_authorization         = true
      enable_all_folders           = true
      enabled_folders              = []
      admin_roles                  = ["admins"]
      roles                        = ["watchers", "admins"]
      enable_folder_roles          = false
      enable_live_tv_roles         = false
      enable_live_tv               = false
      enable_live_tv_management    = false
      live_tv_roles                = []
      live_tv_management_roles     = []
      folder_role_mapping          = []
      role_claim                   = "groups"
      oid_scopes                   = ["groups"]
      default_provider             = ""
      scheme_override              = "https"
      port_override                = 0
      new_path                     = true
      default_username_claim       = "preferred_username"
      avatar_url_format            = ""
      disable_https                = false
      disable_pushed_authorization = false
      do_not_validate_endpoints    = false
      do_not_validate_issuer_name  = false
      do_not_load_profile          = false
    }
  }

  saml_configs = {}
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `plugin_id` (String) The plugin ID (GUID).

### Optional

- `oid_configs` (Attributes Map) Map of OID provider configurations keyed by provider name. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--oid_configs))
- `saml_configs` (Attributes Map) Map of SAML provider configurations keyed by provider name. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--saml_configs))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The plugin configuration resource identifier.

<a id="nestedatt--oid_configs"></a>
### Nested Schema for `oid_configs`

Optional:

- `admin_roles` (List of String) Roles that grant administrator access.
- `avatar_url_format` (String) Avatar URL format.
- `canonical_links` (Map of String) Server-managed canonical links. Omit to preserve server-side mappings.
- `default_provider` (String) Default authentication provider.
- `default_username_claim` (String) Claim used for the default username.
- `disable_https` (Boolean) Whether HTTPS is disabled.
- `disable_pushed_authorization` (Boolean) Whether pushed authorization is disabled.
- `do_not_load_profile` (Boolean) Whether profile loading is skipped.
- `do_not_validate_endpoints` (Boolean) Whether endpoint validation is skipped.
- `do_not_validate_issuer_name` (Boolean) Whether issuer name validation is skipped.
- `enable_all_folders` (Boolean) Whether all folders are enabled.
- `enable_authorization` (Boolean) Whether authorization is enabled.
- `enable_folder_roles` (Boolean) Whether folder roles are enabled.
- `enable_live_tv` (Boolean) Whether live TV is enabled.
- `enable_live_tv_management` (Boolean) Whether live TV management is enabled.
- `enable_live_tv_roles` (Boolean) Whether live TV roles are enabled.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether this provider is enabled.
- `enabled_folders` (List of String) Folders enabled for this provider.
- `folder_role_mapping` (Attributes List) Folder role mappings. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--oid_configs--folder_role_mapping))
- `live_tv_management_roles` (List of String) Roles that grant live TV management access.
- `live_tv_roles` (List of String) Roles that grant live TV access.
- `new_path` (Boolean) Whether to use a new path.
- `oid_client_id` (String) OIDC client ID.
- `oid_endpoint` (String) OIDC endpoint URL.
- `oid_scopes` (List of String) OIDC scopes.
- `oid_secret` (String, Sensitive) OIDC client secret.
- `port_override` (Number) Port override.
- `role_claim` (String) Claim used for roles.
- `roles` (List of String) Roles that grant standard access.
- `scheme_override` (String) Scheme override.

<a id="nestedatt--oid_configs--folder_role_mapping"></a>
### Nested Schema for `oid_configs.folder_role_mapping`

Optional:

- `folders` (List of String) Folders mapped to this role.
- `role` (String) Role name.



<a id="nestedatt--saml_configs"></a>
### Nested Schema for `saml_configs`

Optional:

- `admin_roles` (List of String) Roles that grant administrator access.
- `avatar_url_format` (String) Avatar URL format.
- `canonical_links` (Map of String) Server-managed canonical links. Omit to preserve server-side mappings.
- `default_provider` (String) Default authentication provider.
- `default_username_claim` (String) Claim used for the default username.
- `disable_https` (Boolean) Whether HTTPS is disabled.
- `disable_pushed_authorization` (Boolean) Whether pushed authorization is disabled.
- `do_not_load_profile` (Boolean) Whether profile loading is skipped.
- `do_not_validate_endpoints` (Boolean) Whether endpoint validation is skipped.
- `do_not_validate_issuer_name` (Boolean) Whether issuer name validation is skipped.
- `enable_all_folders` (Boolean) Whether all folders are enabled.
- `enable_authorization` (Boolean) Whether authorization is enabled.
- `enable_folder_roles` (Boolean) Whether folder roles are enabled.
- `enable_live_tv` (Boolean) Whether live TV is enabled.
- `enable_live_tv_management` (Boolean) Whether live TV management is enabled.
- `enable_live_tv_roles` (Boolean) Whether live TV roles are enabled.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether this provider is enabled.

- `live_tv_roles` (List of String) Roles that grant live TV access.

- `port_override` (Number) Port override.
- `role_claim` (String) Claim used for roles.
- `roles` (List of String) Roles that grant standard access.
- `saml_certificate` (String) SAML certificate (public key).
- `saml_client_id` (String) SAML client ID.
- `saml_endpoint` (String) SAML endpoint URL.
- `scheme_override` (String) Scheme override.

<a id="nestedatt--saml_configs--folder_role_mapping"></a>
### Nested Schema for `saml_configs.folder_role_mapping`

Optional:

- `folders` (List of String) Folders mapped to this role.
- `role` (String) Role name.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# The SSO plugin configuration can be imported using the plugin ID (GUID).
terraform import jellyfin_sso_plugin_configuration.example 505ce9d1-d916-42fa-86ca-673ef241d7df
```
